  • Exports
Source   Edit  

Detection System for Spy Scouts and Raiders

Implements ELI-based detection mechanics for spy scouts and cloaked raiders Based on assets.md Sections 2.4.2 and 2.4.3

ELI Mesh Network CalculationSpy Scout DetectionRaider DetectionFleet/Squadron ELI Helpers

Imports

../squadron, ../config/espionage_config

Types

DetectionResult = object
  detected*: bool
  effectiveELI*: int
  threshold*: int
  roll*: int
Result of a detection attempt Source   Edit   
ELIUnit = object
  eliLevels*: seq[int]       ## ELI tech levels of all scouts in unit
  isStarbase*: bool          ## True if this is a starbase (gets +2 ELI bonus vs spies)
A unit capable of ELI detection (fleet with scouts or starbase) Source   Edit  

Procs

proc applyDominantTechPenalty(weightedAvg: int; eliLevels: seq[int]): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Apply dominant tech level penalty (step 2) If >50% of scouts are below weighted average, reduce by 1 Source   Edit   
proc attemptRaiderDetection(detectorELI: int; cloakLevel: int): DetectionResult {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Attempt to detect a cloaked raider fleet (using global RNG) Returns detection result with all roll details

Process:

  1. Get threshold range from detection table
  2. Determine strategy based on ELI advantage
  3. Apply strategy to get threshold
  4. Roll 1d20, if >= threshold then detected
Source   Edit   
proc attemptRaiderDetection(detectorELI: int; cloakLevel: int; rng: var Rand): DetectionResult {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Attempt to detect a cloaked raider fleet (with provided RNG) Returns detection result with all roll details Source   Edit   
proc attemptSpyDetection(detectorELI: int; spyELI: int): DetectionResult {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Attempt to detect a spy scout (using global RNG) Returns detection result with all roll details

Process:

  1. Get threshold range from detection table
  2. Roll 1d3 to select threshold within range
  3. Roll 1d20, if >= threshold then detected
Source   Edit   
proc attemptSpyDetection(detectorELI: int; spyELI: int; rng: var Rand): DetectionResult {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Attempt to detect a spy scout (with provided RNG) Returns detection result with all roll details Source   Edit   
proc calculateEffectiveELI(eliLevels: seq[int]; isStarbase: bool = false): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate final effective ELI level for detection Combines weighted average, dominant tech penalty, and mesh network bonus Starbases get +2 bonus against spy scouts Source   Edit   
proc calculateWeightedAverageELI(eliLevels: seq[int]): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate weighted average ELI level (step 1) Returns rounded-up average Source   Edit   
proc createELIUnit(squadrons: seq[Squadron]; isStarbase: bool = false): ELIUnit {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create an ELIUnit from squadrons or starbase Source   Edit   
proc detectRaider(detectorUnit: ELIUnit; cloakLevel: int): DetectionResult {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
High-level raider detection (using global RNG) Calculates effective ELI and attempts detection Source   Edit   
proc detectRaider(detectorUnit: ELIUnit; cloakLevel: int; rng: var Rand): DetectionResult {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
High-level raider detection (with provided RNG) Calculates effective ELI and attempts detection Source   Edit   
proc detectSpyScout(detectorUnit: ELIUnit; spyELI: int): DetectionResult {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
High-level spy scout detection (using global RNG) Calculates effective ELI and attempts detection Source   Edit   
proc detectSpyScout(detectorUnit: ELIUnit; spyELI: int; rng: var Rand): DetectionResult {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
High-level spy scout detection (with provided RNG) Calculates effective ELI and attempts detection Source   Edit   
proc getFleetCloakLevel(squadrons: seq[Squadron]): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get highest cloaking level in a fleet Fleets are cloaked if they contain raiders Returns highest CLK level, or 0 if no cloaking Source   Edit   
proc getFleetELILevels(squadrons: seq[Squadron]): seq[int] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Extract ELI levels from all scouts in a fleet Source   Edit   
proc getMeshNetworkBonus(scoutCount: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Calculate mesh network modifier based on scout count Per assets.md:2.4.2: 1=+0, 2-3=+1, 4-5=+2, 6+=+3 Source   Edit   
proc getRaiderThresholdStrategy(eliLevel: int; cloakLevel: int): string {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Determine which threshold to use based on ELI advantage Returns: "lower" if ELI is 2+ higher, "random" if equal/1 higher, "upper" if lower Source   Edit   
proc getScoutELILevels(squadron: Squadron): seq[int] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Extract ELI levels from all scouts in a squadron Returns sequence of ELI tech levels Source   Edit   
proc hasELICapability(squadrons: seq[Squadron]): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if fleet has any ELI-capable units (scouts) Source   Edit   
proc rollDetectionThreshold(thresholdRange: ThresholdRange): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Roll 1d3 to select value within threshold range Range is min, max, roll determines which value to use Source   Edit   
proc rollRaiderThreshold(thresholdRange: ThresholdRange; strategy: string): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Roll threshold based on strategy (using global RNG) "lower" = use min, "upper" = use max, "random" = roll 1d3 Source   Edit   
proc rollRaiderThreshold(thresholdRange: ThresholdRange; strategy: string;
                         rng: var Rand): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Roll threshold based on strategy (with provided RNG) Source   Edit  

Exports

ThresholdRange
